mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservations WHERE reservation_date = CURDATE() AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS todayBookings, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM study_rooms WHERE room_status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS activeRooms, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_capacity), 0) FROM study_rooms WHERE room_status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS totalSeats, (SELECT ROUND( COALESCE(SUM(seat_hour_booked),0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(seat_hour_total),0), 0), 1) FROM room_daily_stats WHERE stats_date = CURDATE()) AS occupancyRate

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(reservation_date, '%W') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value, reservation_date AS date FROM reservations WHERE reservation_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND CURDATE() AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY reservation_date ORDER BY reservation_date

SELECT COALESCE(sr.display_name, sr.room_name) AS roomName, ROUND(COALESCE(rds.utilization_rate, 0) * 100, 1) AS rate FROM study_rooms sr LEFT JOIN room_daily_stats rds ON rds.study_room_id = sr.id AND rds.stats_date = CURDATE() WHERE sr.room_status = 'active' AND sr.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY rate DESC LIMIT #{top}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(r.reservation_date, '%W') AS day, r.start_hour AS hour, COUNT(*) AS value FROM reservations r WHERE r.reservation_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND CURDATE() AND r.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY r.reservation_date, r.start_hour ORDER BY r.reservation_date, r.start_hour

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_feedbacks WHERE feedback_status = 'pending' AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS pendingFeedback, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_notices WHERE notice_status = 'draft' AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS draftNotices, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE violation_count >= 3 AND account_status != 'suspended' AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS heavyViolations, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservations WHERE reservation_status = 'violated' AND reservation_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS missedBookings
